info.title: whizbang-migrate
info.description: Migration tool for converting Marten/Wolverine projects to Whizbang

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze a project for migration scope

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the solution or project file

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format (table or json) [default: table]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the solution or project file

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Show what would be changed without modifying files [default: False]

options.name: --include
options.description: Glob patterns for files to include (e.g., '**/*Handler.cs') []

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude (e.g., '**/obj/**') []

options.name: --decision-file
options.description: Path to decision file for controlling migration behavior

options.name: --generate-decision-file
options.description: Generate a default decision file at the specified path (does not apply migration)

options.name: --no-manage-packages
options.description: Skip automatic package reference management [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Create a migration plan without applying changes

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the solution or project file

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file for the plan

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --list
options.description: List available checkpoints

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to the solution or project file

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
